_comment: Comparator tolerance policy - the ONLY place where deviations from byte parity are defined (see conformance/README.md). Changed only with maintainer sign-off. Nullable(...)/LowCardinality(...) wrappers are stripped before mode lookup.

compareModes.why: TSV rendering of doubles differs between ClickHouse and the CLR in the last digits
normalize trailing zeros in the DateTime64 fractional part
CLR DateTime carries a zero time-of-day for Date/Date32; compare the date part
ClickHouse TSV trims trailing fractional zeros (output_format_decimal_trailing_zeros=0) while CLR decimal keeps full scale; values are equal
